name: Croissants
recipeInstructions:
1. COMBINE MILK, first amount of butter, sugar and salt in a small pot and bring to a boil over high heat.
2. REMOVE FROM HEAT AND LET STAND TO ROOM TEMPERATURE. DILUTE YEAST IN WATER AND ADD TO MILK.
3. ADD MIXTURE TO LIQUID AND FLOUR USING A DOUGH HOOK. MIX UNTIL ELASTIC AND STICKY.
4. PLACE DOUGH IN A BOWL, COVER AND LET RISE UNTIL DOUBLE IN SIZE (ABOUT 1 1/2 HOURS).
5. CHILL FOR 30 MINUTES. SOFTEN REMAINING BUTTER BY POUNDING WITH A ROLLING PIN.
6. TRANSFER DOUGH TO A FLORIED BOARD AND SHAPE INTO A 1/4-INCH THICK RECTANGLE.
7. SPREAD BUTTER OVER 2/3 OF THE RECTANGLE CLOSET TO YOU.
8. FOLD THE UNBUTTERED THIRD OVER THE CENTER THIRD, THEN THE BOTTOM 1/3 OVER THE DOUBLED PORTION.
9. SWING DOWNSHIFT TO SOUTH AND ROLL AGAIN INTO A 1/4-INCH THICK OBLONG.
10. FOLD AGAIN IN THREE SECONDS. COVER AND CHILL FOR ANOTHER 2 HOURS.
11. REPEAT FOLDING AND TURNING TWICE MORE, THEN SHAPE DOUGH INTO CRESCENTS.
12. CHILL FOR ADDITIONAL 30 MINUTES BEFORE BAKING.
13. PREHEAT OVEN TO 400F AND BAKE FOR 10 MINUTES.
14. REDUCE HEAT TO 350F AND CONTINUE BAKING UNTIL GOLDEN BROWN (ABOUT 15 MORE MINUTES).
